name: HWR_CSTM_SKILLS_B
description: This will store information regarding the custom skills associated with the users that have been identified.

columns.Name: SKILL_NAME
columns.Comments: This is the name of the skill that has been identified for a particular user.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: This is the description of the skill that has been identified for a particular user.

columns.Name: USER_ID
columns.Comments: This represents the Fusion id of the user for which this skill was found.

columns.Name: IS_SEEDED
columns.Comments: This indicates whether the skill was seeded or not seeded.

columns.Name: NUM_OF_OCCURRENCES
columns.Comments: This represents the number of times a particular skill has been found for a particular user.

columns.Name: IS_REJECTED
columns.Comments: This indicates whether the skill was rejected or not. 0 --> Undecided, 1--> True/Rejected the skill, 2 --> False/Accepted the skill

columns.Name: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_1. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_2. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_3
columns.Comments: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_3. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_4
columns.Comments: CUSTOM_SKILL_ATTR_4. This is the extra attribute in case if needed.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
